mapper.insert: INSERT INTO search_document(space_id,entity_type,entity_public_id,owner_user_id,visibility,title,body,document_date,source_updated_at) SELECT space_id,'DIARY',public_id,user_id,visibility,title,content,date,updated_at FROM diary WHERE diary_id=#{diaryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND locked=0 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE space_id=VALUES(space_id), owner_user_id=VALUES(owner_user_id), visibility=VALUES(visibility), title=VALUES(title), body=VALUES(body), document_date=VALUES(document_date), source_updated_at=VALUES(source_updated_at)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM search_document WHERE entity_type='DIARY' AND entity_public_id=#{publicId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO search_document(space_id,entity_type,entity_public_id,owner_user_id,visibility,title,body,document_date,source_updated_at) SELECT d.space_id,'DIARY',d.public_id,d.user_id,d.visibility,d.title,d.content,d.date,d.updated_at FROM diary d LEFT JOIN search_document s ON s.entity_type='DIARY' AND s.entity_public_id=d.public_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.locked=0 AND (s.document_id IS NULL OR s.source_updated_at<d.updated_at) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE space_id=VALUES(space_id), owner_user_id=VALUES(owner_user_id), visibility=VALUES(visibility), title=VALUES(title), body=VALUES(body), document_date=VALUES(document_date), source_updated_at=VALUES(source_updated_at)
mapper.delete: DELETE s FROM search_document s LEFT JOIN diary d ON d.public_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci=s.entity_public_id AND s.entity_type='DIARY' AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.locked=0 WHERE s.entity_type='DIARY' AND d.diary_id IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT s.entity_type AS entityType, s.entity_public_id AS entityId, s.title, LEFT(s.body, 600) AS snippet, s.document_date AS date, MATCH(s.title,s.body) AGAINST(#{query} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) AS score FROM search_document s INNER JOIN diary d ON d.public_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci=s.entity_public_id AND s.entity_type='DIARY' WHERE s.space_id=#{spaceId} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.locked=0 AND (s.visibility='SHARED' OR s.owner_user_id=#{userId}) AND MATCH(s.title,s.body) AGAINST(#{query} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) ORDER BY score DESC, s.document_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT s.entity_type AS entityType, s.entity_public_id AS entityId, s.title, LEFT(s.body, 600) AS snippet, s.document_date AS date, 0.1 AS score FROM search_document s INNER JOIN diary d ON d.public_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci=s.entity_public_id AND s.entity_type='DIARY' WHERE s.space_id=#{spaceId} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.locked=0 AND (s.visibility='SHARED' OR s.owner_user_id=#{userId}) AND (s.title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{query},'%') OR s.body LIKE CONCAT('%',#{query},'%')) ORDER BY s.document_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
